rationale: For the scope angle, Review 2's third finding correctly diagnoses the single-unit problem — that legitimate Layer-0 foundations (AffineAlgGroup, AlgPoints) are bundled with premature Layer-5/6 placeholders — and recommends splitting out the salvageable work rather than deleting everything; Review 1 instead frames the issue mainly as a roadmap 'don't bundle smoothness' design point and tells the author to remove the placeholder classes without recognizing the reusable foundations, which I could confirm are plausibly self-contained in the diff. Both block correctly and overlap heavily, so the edge is modest.
